title: Diplazium andinum
taxonomy: Diplazium andinum is classified within the family Athyriaceae. This plant is further categorized as part of the order Polypodiales. At the family level, it is grouped with the Athyrium genus, and at the genus level, it is grouped with the Diplazium genus. The full classification of Diplazium andinum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Athyriaceae, Genus: Diplazium, Species: D. andinum. This classification highlights its position among ferns and its unique characteristics within the Diplazium genus.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.
